evidence.text: The World Health Organization states that counterfeit or fake medical products can cause serious health risks and may contain incorrect ingredients or dosages.
Government health agencies warn that fake medicines reduce treatment effectiveness and can lead to drug resistance or treatment failure.
Medicines should only be purchased from licensed pharmacies to ensure authenticity and safety.
